name: canshare-tnm-gi-yp-stage-group
title: NZ AJCC gastrointestinal pathological post therapy (neoadjuvant) stage group
description: A post therapy or post neoadjuvant therapy pathological tumour stage group that describe how far a gastrointestinal cancer has grown and spread, using AJCC cancer staging manual.
